summary: Trade Journal AI Integration Testing (Phase 1+2). Backend APIs verified: 15/18 tests passed (83%). GET /api/trades returns trades with ai_context and source fields. GET /api/trades/ai/learning-stats returns journal_outcomes count and outcome breakdown. POST /api/trades creates trades with source field. POST /api/trades/{id}/enrich-ai enriches trades with AI context (Confidence Gate, TQS, model predictions). POST /api/trades/{id}/close closes trades and feeds learning loop. Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for AI context badges.

minor.issue: Intermittent timeout on first request after backend restart (30s timeout exceeded)
Some old closed trades missing 'outcome' field (pre-upgrade trades)

action_items: Consider adding migration script to backfill 'outcome' field for old closed trades
Backend startup takes ~30s - first API calls may timeout during this period
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/trades returns trades with ai_context field containing confidence_gate, tqs_score, model_prediction
VERIFIED: GET /api/trades returns trades with source field (manual/bot/ib)
VERIFIED: GET /api/trades/ai/learning-stats returns journal_outcomes count and outcome breakdown (won/lost/breakeven)
VERIFIED: POST /api/trades creates trade with source field defaulting to 'manual'
VERIFIED: POST /api/trades/{id}/enrich-ai captures Confidence Gate decision, TQS score, model prediction
VERIFIED: POST /api/trades/{id}/close calculates P&L, sets outcome, feeds learning loop
VERIFIED: Frontend TradeJournalPage.js has AIContextBadge component with data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: Frontend has data-testid='ai-gate-badge', 'ai-tqs-badge', 'ai-prediction-badge' for AI context display
VERIFIED: Frontend has data-testid='enrich-ai-{id}' for Enrich with AI button (Zap icon)
VERIFIED: Enrich button only appears on OPEN trades without ai_context (line 319-329)
VERIFIED: AI Learning Loop stats panel renders when journal_outcomes > 0 (line 982-1016)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - browser automation had stability issues

seed_data_creation: Test trades created with TEST_ prefix for CRUD testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Journal AI Integration (Phase 1+2) is functional. Backend APIs work correctly. The AAPL test trade has ai_context with Confidence Gate REDUCE decision, TQS score 60.6, and model prediction DOWN. Learning loop is being fed - 1 journal outcome recorded. Frontend code has proper data-testid attributes. Browser automation had stability issues but code review confirms UI components are correctly implemented.
